strategies.label: Enable default EBS encryption (AWS managed key)

dependency_checks.message: WriteRole is required for direct-fix execution.
Default encryption applies to newly created volumes; existing volumes are unchanged.

warnings: New volumes will encrypt by default; existing volumes are unchanged.
strategies.impact_text: All new EBS volumes in this region will be encrypted by default.
blocked_reasons: WriteRole is required for direct-fix execution.
strategies.decision_rationale: Wave 2 compatibility defaulted to the single compatible profile 'ebs_enable_default_encryption_aws_managed_kms' for strategy 'ebs_enable_default_encryption_aws_managed_kms'. Blocking checks: WriteRole is required for direct-fix execution..

strategies.label: Generate PR bundle for default EBS encryption (AWS managed key)

dependency_checks.message: Default encryption applies to newly created volumes; existing volumes are unchanged.

warnings: Apply the bundle before creating new volumes to enforce encryption by default.
strategies.impact_text: All new EBS volumes in this region will be encrypted by default.
strategies.decision_rationale: Wave 2 compatibility defaulted to the single compatible profile 'ebs_enable_default_encryption_aws_managed_kms_pr_bundle' for strategy 'ebs_enable_default_encryption_aws_managed_kms_pr_bundle'.

strategies.label: Enable default EBS encryption (customer KMS key)

fields.description: Customer-managed KMS key ARN to set as EBS default key.

dependency_checks.message: WriteRole is required for direct-fix execution.
Validate KMS key policy/grants for all required service and compute principals.

warnings: Key policy and grant coverage must include all required compute roles.
strategies.impact_text: All new EBS volumes in this region will be encrypted by default using the specified customer-managed KMS key.
blocked_reasons: WriteRole is required for direct-fix execution.
strategies.decision_rationale: Wave 2 compatibility defaulted to the single compatible profile 'ebs_enable_default_encryption_customer_kms' for strategy 'ebs_enable_default_encryption_customer_kms'. Blocking checks: WriteRole is required for direct-fix execution..

strategies.label: Generate PR bundle for default EBS encryption (customer KMS key)

fields.description: Customer-managed KMS key ARN to set as EBS default key.

dependency_checks.message: Validate KMS key policy/grants for all required service and compute principals.

warnings: Validate key policy access and regional key alignment before apply.
strategies.impact_text: All new EBS volumes in this region will be encrypted by default using the specified customer-managed KMS key.
strategies.decision_rationale: Wave 2 compatibility defaulted to the single compatible profile 'ebs_enable_default_encryption_customer_kms_pr_bundle' for strategy 'ebs_enable_default_encryption_customer_kms_pr_bundle'.

recommendation.rationale: Matrix cell risk_medium__criticality_high maps to default recommendation 'pr_only'. Risk is medium and business criticality is high. Criticality evidence: data_sensitivity=0.70, privilege_level=1.00, internet_exposure=0.00, matched_signals=none.
